description: Phase 78: Create @quant/wearables package for smart glasses, watches, headsets with device abstraction, HUD rendering, cross-device handoff, translation overlay, and camera passthrough AR bridge.
steps: Create packages/wearables/ with package.json (name: @quant/wearables, deps: zod, pino, @quant/common workspace:*), tsconfig.json extending ../../tsconfig.json with composite:true/outDir:./dist/rootDir:./src

Create src/types.ts with TypeScript types: WearableDevice (id, type: 'glasses'|'watch'|'headset', name, capabilities[], connectionStatus), HUDElement (id, type: 'notification'|'translation'|'navigation'|'info', position, content, priority, ttl), HandoffSession (id, sourceDevice, targetDevice, state, context, startedAt), TranslationOverlay (id, sourceLang, targetLang, segments[], position), ARPassthroughConfig (resolution, frameRate, overlayMode, anchoredObjects[])

Create src/devices/device-registry.ts with DeviceRegistry class: register(device), unregister(deviceId), getConnected(), getByType(type), getCapabilities(deviceId). Follow CapabilityRegistry pattern from device-control.

Create src/devices/glasses-adapter.ts with GlassesAdapter class: connect(deviceId), disconnect(), getDisplayInfo(), startCamera(), stopCamera(), getPassthrough(). Supports Meta Ray-Ban, Xreal, Vision Pro profiles.
Create src/devices/watch-adapter.ts with WatchAdapter class: connect(), disconnect(), getHealthMetrics(), sendNotification(), getInput(). Supports Pixel Watch, Apple Watch profiles.
Create src/devices/headset-adapter.ts with HeadsetAdapter class: connect(), disconnect(), getTrackingData(), startImmersive(), stopImmersive(). Supports Quest, Vision Pro profiles.

Create src/hud/hud-engine.ts with HUDEngine class: render(elements[]), addElement(element), removeElement(id), clear(), setLayout(layout), getActiveElements(). Minimal heads-up display info rendering.
Create src/hud/notification-renderer.ts with NotificationRenderer: formatForGlasses(notification), formatForWatch(notification), prioritize(notifications[]).

Create src/handoff/handoff-manager.ts with HandoffManager class: initiateHandoff(fromDevice, toDevice, context), acceptHandoff(sessionId), rejectHandoff(sessionId), getActiveSessions(), transferState(sessionId). Phone-to-glasses-to-watch continuity.

Create src/translation/translation-overlay.ts with TranslationOverlayService class: startSession(sourceLang, targetLang), addSegment(text, position), getOverlay(), endSession(). Real-time translation overlay.

Create src/ar-bridge/passthrough-bridge.ts with PassthroughBridge class: initialize(config), startCapture(), stopCapture(), addOverlay(overlay), removeOverlay(id), getFrame(). Connects to ar-lenses/spatial-ui concepts.
Create src/index.ts barrel exporting all types, classes, and schemas
Create src/__tests__/device-registry.test.ts testing register, unregister, getConnected, getByType
Create src/__tests__/hud-engine.test.ts testing render, addElement, removeElement, layout management
Create src/__tests__/handoff-manager.test.ts testing initiateHandoff, acceptHandoff, transferState flow
Create src/__tests__/translation-overlay.test.ts testing startSession, addSegment, getOverlay
Create src/__tests__/passthrough-bridge.test.ts testing initialize, startCapture, addOverlay
acceptance_criteria: pnpm typecheck --filter=@quant/wearables passes with no errors
pnpm test --filter=@quant/wearables passes all tests (minimum 15 test cases across 5 test files)
Package exports DeviceRegistry, GlassesAdapter, WatchAdapter, HeadsetAdapter, HUDEngine, HandoffManager, TranslationOverlayService, PassthroughBridge
All zod schemas validate correct input and reject invalid input
verification: source /root/.nvm/nvm.sh && nvm use 22 && cd /projects/sandbox/Quant-Ecosystem && pnpm install && pnpm typecheck --filter=@quant/wearables
source /root/.nvm/nvm.sh && nvm use 22 && cd /projects/sandbox/Quant-Ecosystem && pnpm test --filter=@quant/wearables
